SELECT ip_address, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM ip_test;
CREATE TABLE ip_test_nested AS SELECT ip_address FROM (SELECT '192.168.100.1' AS ip_address UNION ALL SELECT '10.300.1.1' UNION ALL SELECT '172.16.0.0');
SELECT ip_address, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM ip_test_nested;
CREATE TABLE valid_ips AS SELECT '172.16.0.1' AS ip_address UNION ALL SELECT '255.255.255.255';
CREATE TABLE invalid_ips AS SELECT '0.0.0.256' AS ip_address UNION ALL SELECT 'hello.world';
SELECT ip_address, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM valid_ips UNION ALL SELECT ip_address, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM invalid_ips;

CREATE TABLE cross_test AS SELECT t1.ip_address FROM (SELECT '192.168.10.1' AS ip_address UNION ALL SELECT '192.168.1.2') AS t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT '172.16.0.1' AS ip_address) AS t2 ON t1.ip_address LIKE '192.%';
SELECT ip_address, IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address) AS ip_num FROM cross_test;
CREATE TABLE mixed_test AS SELECT ip_address FROM ip_test UNION ALL SELECT '192.0.2.1';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS valid_ips_count, SUM(IPv4StringToNumOrDefault(ip_address)) AS total_ip_num FROM mixed_test;
